title: pelargonium crithmifolium
intro: Pelargonium crithmifolium, also known as Lemon-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pelargonium crithmifolium are often used to make teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being.
